open.title: Metrofibre Outage |  Carlswald AH
open.description: Metrofibre has informed us of a network outage affecting  Carlswald AH, affected clients will experience limited to no connectivity. Metrofibre engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

open.title: Vumatel Reach Outage | Motherwell
open.description: Vumatel Reach has informed us of a network outage affecting Motherwell, affected clients will experience limited to no connectivity. Vumatel engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content: Technicians  are busy floating one side, while the other team is opening the other side. The teams couldn't get the slack as the manholes on both directions are not traceable.
Technicians have tested a disconnect at 10km, technicians are enroute to localize the fault.
